parts.text: Perform a competitive analysis for Mario's Pizzeria located at 123 Main St, Nutley, NJ 07110. Category: Italian restaurant / pizza. Find competitors within 1 mile and analyze the competitive landscape. Return a detailed JSON report with competitor profiles and market positioning.

{"score": 62, "market_summary": "Mario's Pizzeria operates in a moderately competitive market with 4 direct competitors within 1 mile. The local pizza market shows healthy demand, but Mario's faces pressure from a recently opened chain location. Mario's primary advantage is its 20-year local reputation and cash-only authentic NY-style pizza. parts.text: Perform a competitive analysis for Glow Salon & Spa located at 456 Oak Ave, Montclair, NJ 07042. Category: hair salon and spa services. Find competitors within 1 mile and analyze the competitive landscape. Return a detailed JSON report with competitor profiles and market positioning.

{"score": 55, "market_summary": "Glow Salon & Spa competes in a fragmented market with 5 direct competitors within 1 mile of Montclair. The Upper Montclair corridor has strong disposable income demographics favoring premium service businesses. Glow's main differentiation opportunity is its spa services — most competitors are pure salons without spa treatments. The mid-range pricing positions it well between budget chains and luxury day spas.", "competitors": [{"name": "Salon Bellissimo", "address": "412 Bloomfield Ave, Montclair, NJ", "threat_level": 8, "strengths": ["Online booking", "4.7 Google rating", "Large team of stylists", "Active Instagram with 2.1K followers"], "weaknesses": ["No spa services", "Higher wait times"]}, {"name": "Great Clips", "address": "500 Bloomfield Ave, Montclair, NJ", "threat_level": 4, "strengths": ["Low price", "Walk-in model", "Brand recognition"], "weaknesses": ["Budget positioning", "No spa", "High turnover"]}, {"name": "The Beauty Spot", "address": "389 Park St, Montclair, NJ", "threat_level": 6, "strengths": ["Boutique atmosphere", "Color specialization"], "weaknesses": ["Small team", "Limited availability"]}], "avg_threat_level": 6, "opportunities": ["Market spa services aggressively — competitors don't offer them", "Launch online booking to compete with Salon Bellissimo", "Build Instagram presence to match local competitors"], "positioning_recommendation": "Glow should lead with its spa differentiation: position as the only full-service salon + spa in Upper Montclair, justifying a premium over pure salons while offering more than a day spa alone."}
